summary: Second iteration backend testing for SpacedChinese. All 30/30 pytest tests pass (100%). Verified: 20 NPCR lessons seeded (numbered 1-20, unique titles incl. lesson 6 '我们去游泳，好吗' and lesson 20 '我打算去中国', each with vocabulary_count>0, dialogue and grammar_notes arrays). 29+ drills covering lessons 1-20; ?lesson_number=15 filter works. All existing endpoints (auth signup/login/me/PUT, flashcards due/new/review SRS stage 1->2->3, reset to 1 on incorrect, progress dashboard & stats, drills attempt, speaking/evaluate perfect/partial/empty) still pass. New /api/speaking/transcribe endpoint correctly handles: missing file -> 422, tiny <100B file -> 400 with 'too small' detail, unsupported extension normalized to .m4a, no Bearer token -> 401, malformed audio bytes -> 502 with 'Transcription failed:' detail. With a valid Whisper response (200) it returns transcribed_text + score(0-100) + correct(bool) + feedback + target_text when target_chinese is provided (verified by code path + endpoint shape; live Whisper on our fake bytes returns 502 as designed). Frontend testing skipped per request (microphone needs native build).
action_items: Carry forward from iteration_1 (still applies): Profile logout uses Alert.alert which is a no-op on Expo Web — Platform-aware confirm fix recommended.
OPTIONAL hardening for /api/speaking/transcribe: also reject content-type mismatches before disk write; current size check (100B-25MB) and extension normalization are fine.
OPTIONAL: enforce minimum 1s/some duration on Whisper input or surface clearer message than generic 'Transcription failed' so frontend can prompt user to record longer.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~670 lines; still under the 700-line guideline but very close. Recommend splitting into routers/{auth,lessons,flashcards,drills,speaking,progress}.py after one more feature.

/api/speaking/transcribe writes uploaded audio to a NamedTemporaryFile then re-opens by path — works but two file handles per request; could pass the bytes via BytesIO to OpenAISpeechToText.transcribe(file=...) if it accepts file-like objects (currently passes an open() handle). Acceptable.

transcribe endpoint catches all Exceptions and returns 502 with the raw exception string in detail — leaks internal info. Consider logging full trace (already done) but returning a sanitized message like 'Transcription failed, please try again'.
seed_lessons_and_vocab() reseeding clears drills as well — drill_attempts.drill_id references become orphaned after a reseed. Not user-facing (history endpoints don't dereference), but worth a note.

GET /api/lessons still does 2 count_documents per lesson (now 40 round-trips for 20 lessons). Latency from preview-->backend dominates; consider an aggregation lookup if the list grows to lessons across multiple books.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py (expanded lessons assertions 5->20 and added drill filter test)
seed_data_creation: Each pytest run creates 2 TEST_<uuid>@example.com users (one shared 'auth_token' if seeded test@test.com missing, one fresh_user for SRS isolation). test@test.com / password123 is intact. 20 lessons + ~110 vocab + 29 drills are auto-seeded on startup; reseed logic correctly preserves user-owned collections (flashcards, review_history, drill_attempts, speaking_attempts) when lesson count changes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend now has 30 pytest tests across /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py and /app/backend/tests/test_whisper.py — run with `python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env is used (https://mandarin-speak-2.preview.emergentagent.com). Whisper tests intentionally accept both 200 and 502 since fake audio bytes will not transcribe — only the endpoint shape, auth gating, and validation paths are asserted. For real microphone testing, an Android/iOS build is required (Expo Web does not support expo-audio recording reliably). Frontend rebrand to 'SpacedChinese' was NOT visually verified this iteration.
rca_of_issue: No new bugs. Whisper 502 on fake audio bytes is expected behavior (server correctly catches the OpenAI exception and returns 502 with 'Transcription failed: ...'). Iteration_1's logout-on-web bug remains (Alert.alert no-op) but is out of scope for this iteration.
